name: gogo-pantry
description: GoGO Pantry - Full stack ecommerce application

scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail false -n backend,customer,staff -c green,cyan,yellow "npm run backend" "npm run customer" "npm run staff"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail false -n backend,customer,staff -c green,cyan,yellow "npm run backend:dev" "npm run customer" "npm run staff"
